# linacre.site

> David Linacre builds reliable web applications, developer tools and automation systems. Full-stack engineer focused on speed, security, and developer experience.

## Full Content
- /llms-full.txt — complete site content (services & pricing, FAQs, projects & case studies, full engineering articles, toolkit, learning roadmap), generated at build for AI retrieval.

## About
- Full name: David Christopher Linacre
- Location: United Kingdom
- Contact: david@linacre.site
- Expertise: React, TypeScript, Go, Docker, AI sandboxes, high-performance systems

## Key Pages
- / — Useful start page and private browser utilities
- /projects — Open source and production projects
- /about — Detailed bio and skills
- /blog — Technical deep-dives
- /learn — Free learning roadmap
- /playground — Client-side utilities
- /contact — Secure enquiry form
- /work — Services and availability

## Notable Projects
- Mob Deals — Transparent UK SIM-only comparison, public source checks, and PAC/STAC switching help.
- PokeGuru — Pokémon TCG search, UK pricing, set history, and local collection tracking.
- DKMA Monster — Android OEM battery guidance with optional ADB, root, and Magisk automation.
- Linacre Uninstaller — Safety-tiered Android app review and guided uninstall utility.
- linacre.site — Private browser tools, an edited project portfolio, and a developer playground.

## Technical Specifications
- local client-side environment runs on Node.js & React SPA.
- static endpoints are statically pre-rendered at build-time.
- rate limits and secure credentials cached via serverless Vercel Edge proxies.
